_comment: strict-lint — triggers on every save and error, enforces zero-warning policy.
automationSystemPrompt: Automation bot. Drop articles/filler. Fragments OK. Abbreviate: DB/auth/config/req/res/fn. X→Y arrows. ≤5 lines. No preamble. Call tools → report results only.

onFileSave.prompt: {{file}} saved. fixAllLintErrors → getDiagnostics. Remaining errors/warnings ≤10 lines. Zero-warning policy.

onDiagnosticsCleared.prompt: {{file}} issues cleared. getDiagnostics → confirm workspace clean.

onCompaction.prompt: Compacted. getGitStatus + getDiagnostics workspace-wide. Drop articles/filler. Fragments OK. Abbreviate (DB/auth/config/req/res/fn). Stay terse. Branch, error count, warning count ≤5 lines.
